description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure dressed in urban casual attire, featuring a long-sleeve pullover with a hood and the text 'FML 2020' on the front. The figure wears a beanie hat, glasses, and shorts over thigh-high striped socks, paired with classic lace-up sneakers. The character's hands are relaxed at the sides, and the facial expression is neutral, with visible eyebrows and a small nose. The overall build is slender, with slightly exaggerated proportions typical of stylized digital characters. The clothing appears fitted and layered, with the shorts and socks providing a distinct visual contrast. Accessories include the beanie and glasses, adding to the urban, youthful aesthetic.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian in urban casual attire, wearing a hooded pullover, shorts, striped thigh-high socks, sneakers, a beanie, and glasses. The figure has a slender build and a neutral stance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pullover with 'FML 2020', beanie, glasses, shorts, striped socks, and sneakers clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the beanie, glasses, nose, and the layered look of the pullover and shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hooded pullover, shorts, and the striped socks extending down to the sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the beanie, glasses, and the relaxed arm posture.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded pullover, shorts, thigh-high socks, beanie hat, and glasses
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length straight hair, partially covered by beanie
